ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., sale, extended, tax) */,
  "product_price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the product was sold */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date the product was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual delivery date */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the order (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product in the order */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., shipped, backordered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  "payment_method_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the payment method was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment belongs to */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for reference */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
